title: crassocephalum effusum
intro: Crassocephalum effusum, also known as East African lettuce or bush lettuce, is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae, native to East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, and is also used to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Crassocephalum effusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in the form of poultices, salves, or ointments.
